options.content:
# Business Alignment & Team Health Metrics

## Team Health Score (DORA-based, 0-100)
Based on elite benchmarks from DORA State of DevOps reports:

| Metric | Elite Benchmark | Score Formula |
|--------|----------------|---------------|
| Deploy Frequency | 1/day | min(25, (freq / 1.0) × 25) |
| Lead Time | 24 hours | min(25, (24.0 / hours) × 25) |
| Change Failure Rate | 5% | min(25, (5.0 / cfr%) × 25) |
| MTTR | 1 hour | min(25, (1.0 / hours) × 25) |

**Health Levels:** Elite (≥80) | High (≥60) | Medium (≥40) | Low (<40)

## Business Value Score (0-100)
`Score = 50 (base) + Revenue Impact Weight + Efficiency Bonus`

| Revenue Impact | Weight | Efficiency Ratio | Bonus |
|---------------|--------|-----------------|-------|
| Direct | +30 | ≥5 | +20 |
| Enabling | +20 | ≥2 | +15 |
| Supporting | +10 | ≥1 | +10 |
| Cost Center | +0 | >0 | +5 |

targets.rawSql: SELECT total_score FROM team_health_scores ORDER BY calculated_at DESC LIMIT 1
SELECT health_level FROM team_health_scores ORDER BY calculated_at DESC LIMIT 1

SELECT 'Deploy Freq' as metric, deploy_freq_score as score FROM team_health_scores WHERE calculated_at = (SELECT MAX(calculated_at) FROM team_health_scores) UNION ALL SELECT 'Lead Time', lead_time_score FROM team_health_scores WHERE calculated_at = (SELECT MAX(calculated_at) FROM team_health_scores) UNION ALL SELECT 'CFR', cfr_score FROM team_health_scores WHERE calculated_at = (SELECT MAX(calculated_at) FROM team_health_scores) UNION ALL SELECT 'MTTR', mttr_score FROM team_health_scores WHERE calculated_at = (SELECT MAX(calculated_at) FROM team_health_scores)
SELECT COUNT(*) as total FROM business_initiatives
SELECT COUNT(*) as active FROM business_initiatives WHERE status = 'active'
SELECT AVG(business_value_score) as avg_score FROM business_initiatives WHERE business_value_score > 0
SELECT SUM(story_points) as points FROM work_allocations
SELECT COALESCE(investment_category, 'Uncategorized') as category, COUNT(*) as count FROM business_initiatives GROUP BY investment_category
SELECT COALESCE(business_capability, 'Unclassified') as capability, COUNT(*) as count FROM business_initiatives GROUP BY business_capability
SELECT COALESCE(revenue_impact, 'Unknown') as impact, COUNT(*) as count FROM business_initiatives GROUP BY revenue_impact

SELECT bi.name as initiative, bi.jira_epic_key as epic, bi.status, bi.business_capability, bi.revenue_impact, bi.business_value_score, bi.revenue_to_cost_ratio, COUNT(wa.id) as work_items, SUM(wa.story_points) as story_points FROM business_initiatives bi LEFT JOIN work_allocations wa ON wa.initiative_id = bi.id GROUP BY bi.id, bi.name, bi.jira_epic_key, bi.status, bi.business_capability, bi.revenue_impact, bi.business_value_score, bi.revenue_to_cost_ratio ORDER BY bi.business_value_score DESC

panels.title: Initiative Summary with Business Value Scores

targets.rawSql: SELECT project_name, period_start, period_end, deploy_frequency, lead_time_hours, change_failure_rate, mttr_hours, deploy_freq_score, lead_time_score, cfr_score, mttr_score, total_score, health_level, calculated_at FROM team_health_scores ORDER BY calculated_at DESC LIMIT 10

panels.title: Team Health Score History (Raw DORA Metrics)

options.content:
## Working Agreements
Team-defined thresholds for key development practices. Violations are tracked automatically.

| Agreement Type | Description | Common Thresholds |
|---------------|-------------|-------------------|
| PR Merge Time | Max time from PR open to merge | 7 days |
| Review Turnaround | Max time to first review | 24 hours |
| WIP Limit | Max open PRs per developer | 3 PRs |
| Issues In Progress | Max issues in progress per developer | 2 issues |

targets.rawSql: SELECT COUNT(*) as agreements FROM working_agreements
SELECT COUNT(*) as active_violations FROM agreement_violations WHERE is_resolved = false
SELECT AVG(compliance_rate) as avg_compliance FROM agreement_compliance_summaries WHERE period_end >= DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 30 DAY)
SELECT COUNT(*) as resolved_today FROM agreement_violations WHERE is_resolved = true AND DATE(resolved_at) = CURDATE()
SELECT agreement_type as type, COUNT(*) as count FROM agreement_violations WHERE is_resolved = false GROUP BY agreement_type
SELECT DATE(violated_at) as time, COUNT(*) as violations FROM agreement_violations WHERE violated_at >= DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 30 DAY) GROUP BY DATE(violated_at) ORDER BY time
SELECT wa.project_name, wa.agreement_type, wa.threshold_value, wa.threshold_unit, wa.alert_enabled, wa.description FROM working_agreements wa ORDER BY wa.project_name, wa.agreement_type

SELECT av.project_name, av.agreement_type, av.entity_type, av.entity_key, av.current_value, av.threshold_value, av.excess_value, av.violated_at, av.is_resolved, av.resolved_at FROM agreement_violations av ORDER BY av.is_resolved ASC, av.violated_at DESC LIMIT 50

SELECT project_name, agreement_type, DATE(period_start) as period_start, DATE(period_end) as period_end, total_checked, total_compliant, total_violations, compliance_rate, average_value, p50_value, p90_value FROM agreement_compliance_summaries ORDER BY period_end DESC, project_name LIMIT 20
